beats: 被点检标记的那项参数节点，在空间地图上由琥珀转为红色告警
数据分析员以全景孪生远程介入，呈现为车间内的半透明蓝色协作虚影
他抬手确认趋势、派发工单

voiceover.speaker: 澄
voiceover.text: 这里，刚刚红了。别急——我把老师傅的分身，请到你身边来，一起看。

prompt.positive: 16:9 cinematic medium shot at the membrane Winding Station (卷制工位); the winding-tension XR node shifts from amber to alarm red (#ef4444); a soft blue holographic avatar of an experienced master (老师傅分身) is summoned and materializes beside the station — clearly a translucent holographic presence, upper body and hands, not a solid person — leaning in to inspect the alarm together; soft even light, photorealistic, 8K
prompt.negative: physical display screens, wall monitors, cyberpunk neon, solid ghost (analyst must read as semi-transparent overlay), cluttered background, cartoon, blurry, low quality, distorted faces, text artifacts, watermark, logo, dark lighting
